name: Entra ID Accounts Never Used (90 days)
description: Detects active Entra ID accounts older than 90 days that have never logged in.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.display_name AS account_name, u.created_datetime AS created_at FROM entra_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.account_enabled, true) = true AND u.last_sign_in_datetime IS NULL AND u.created_datetime < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'
remediation: Remove or disable never-used accounts and fix any over-provisioning in onboarding workflows.
